# Agentic Research Router Full Context

This compact file is for agents that want one fetch before routing into the corpus.

## Recommended Path

- Read llms.txt.
- Use direct routes in llms.txt when they match.
- Use agent-router.json for ambiguous routing or hot concept aliases.
- Open the narrow feature/topic/session page.
- Check coverage before making strong claims.
- Follow Apple source links for exact API details.

## Features

- foundation-models: Foundation Models -> agent-corpus/features/foundation-models.md
- core-ai: Core AI -> agent-corpus/features/core-ai.md
- app-intents-siri: App Intents And Siri -> agent-corpus/features/app-intents-siri.md
- xcode-agents: Xcode Agents And Developer Workflow -> agent-corpus/features/xcode-agents.md
- swiftui-ui-frameworks: SwiftUI And UI Frameworks -> agent-corpus/features/swiftui-ui-frameworks.md
- swiftdata: SwiftData -> agent-corpus/features/swiftdata.md
- evaluations: Evaluations -> agent-corpus/features/evaluations.md
- agentic-security: Agentic Security -> agent-corpus/features/agentic-security.md
- visual-intelligence: Visual Intelligence And Image Understanding -> agent-corpus/features/visual-intelligence.md
- mlx-local-models: MLX And Local Models -> agent-corpus/features/mlx-local-models.md
- performance-observability: Performance And Observability -> agent-corpus/features/performance-observability.md
- accessibility: Accessibility -> agent-corpus/features/accessibility.md
